• Upload an image or video to degrade its resolution and audio quality over time.
  • Control degradation with parameters like final scale, pixelate step, and audio crush.
  • Generate a degraded video/WebM or animated GIF as output.
  • Real-time preview shows progressive degradation on a canvas.
    const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d', { alpha: false });

This web app degrades media resolution and audio in real-time. Users upload a file, adjust degradation settings, and preview the effect live. It supports both video (with optional recording) and image (to GIF) processing, using canvas manipulation and Web Audio API for effects.
